text:
Once upon a time there was a little girl named Lily who had a very large teddy bear named Mr. Fluffykins. Lily loved everything about Mr. Fluffykins—his soft fur, his big eyes, and the way he smelled of vanilla. Every evening she'd cuddle up to him until drowsiness claimed her.

One day Lily decided she wanted to explore the forest that surrounded her house. She'd never gone far because Mom always told her that the woods were busy with wild animals. But today seemed clear.

Lily crept carefully through the underbrush. Birds cooed, squirrels chattered, but nothing threatened her courage. Just past the big oak tree where her great-grandmother used to sit had she discovered an old shed. Inside were treasures—old maps, forgotten treasures from Grandma's attic, and her old plush doll that smelled like cherry blossom.

That's when things got strange. As she brushed against a branch, something furry jumped into her arms.
